decisions.briefing: Markets drifted sideways today with both indices essentially flat at -0.1% — a low-conviction session with no strong macro catalyst in either direction. Portfolio cash sits at $477, just below the $500 threshold that would trigger new position sizing, so no new buys are executed today despite 4 open slots and a strong bench of 95-score candidates (USAR, NAVN, LFTO, CHRN). Current positions are held; existing momentum plays remain intact pending next entry window.

market_education.summary_en: US equity markets posted a near-flat session on June 17, 2026, with both the NASDAQ and S&P 500 dipping 0.1% in thin, directionless trading. The absence of major macro catalysts — no significant Fed commentary or earnings surprises — kept institutional buyers largely sidelined. Investors appeared content to consolidate recent gains ahead of anticipated economic data releases later in the week.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市在2026年6月17日幾乎橫盤整理，那斯達克與標普500指數均微跌0.1%，交投清淡且方向感欠奉。市場缺乏重大宏觀催化劑，既無聯儲局官員重要表態，亦無突出財報，令機構資金普遍觀望。投資者傾向在本週稍後公佈更多經濟數據前，先消化近期累積升幅。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag is the performance penalty a portfolio suffers when uninvested cash earns little return while the broader market compounds upward. Today's portfolio holds $477 in idle cash — just shy of the $500 buy threshold — meaning roughly 4% of capital is sitting out instead of working. Keeping cash drag low by staying invested in quality positions is a key discipline for outperforming passive benchmarks like VOO over time.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「現金拖累」是指投資組合中閒置現金因收益率偏低、未能參與市場上漲而產生的績效損失。今日組合有477美元閒置，略低於500美元的建倉門檻，意味著約4%的資金未能複利運作。在持有優質部位的前提下盡量壓低現金拖累，是長期跑贏VOO等被動指數的關鍵紀律之一。
